ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticker */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the ticker */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickers_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickers_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickers_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticker symbol */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded for the day */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical price entry */,
  "trade_count" INTEGER /* Number of trades for the day */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker symbol */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticker symbol */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, trend analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticker symbol */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price drop, volume spike) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "triggered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_note" TEXT /* Note describing the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_triggered_by FOREIGN KEY ("triggered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the watchlist is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_tickers" (
  "watchlist_ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist-ticker relationship */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker symbol */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the ticker was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_tickers_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_tickers_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticker symbol */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticker symbol */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price set by the analyst */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)
